pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh SQL injections which show precise milestone actual_date inversions for exactly these projects matching their EIA-860 capacity and exact violation descriptions.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated project data using real wind farm metadata from the EIA-860 database. The "contaminated_projects" explicitly mirror data inserted by the setup scripts: Shepherds Flat (845MW) has a "Construction Complete" actual_date (2023-03-15) earlier than "Permitting Approved" (2023-09-20); Alta Wind (1548MW) has "Commercial Operation" (2023-06-01) earlier than "Grid Interconnection" (2024-01-15); Roscoe (781.5MW) has "Financial Close" (2022-11-01) earlier than "Environmental Review" (2023-04-15); and Horse Hollow (735.5MW) has "Grid Interconnection" (2023-02-01) earlier than "Construction Start" (2023-08-20). The Oracle features "DBMS_SCHEDULER", "CONNECT BY", "PIVOT", "CHECK Constraints", and "Range Partitioning" are explicitly required by the task instructions, verifier logic, and initial setup.
